html.skin-theme-clientpref-os .mw-parser-output .infobox-full-data .locmap div Bear Canyon class notpageimage Location of Bear Canyon Alberta Bear Canyon is a rural community in northern Alberta , Canada. 1 Located in Clear Hills County , it is 200 km 120 mi west of Peace River , approximately 200 km 120 mi northwest of Grande Prairie . citation needed The community had its own school, Bear Canyon School, until the early 2000s. 1 It also took students from nearby farms in British Columbia . 2 References edit .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3
